case_title: JEANNE SCHLOTZ VS. HARTFORD UNDERWRITERS INS. CO.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-26-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-26-2024 BY CAROLYN GOLD. PLAINTIFF JEANNE SCHLOTZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HARTFORD UNDERWRITERS INS. CO, REPRESENTED BY BRIAN SCHMALL IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CAROLYN GOLD; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY SCHLOTZ, JEANNE AS TO DEFENDANT HARTFORD UNDERWRITERS INS. CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-26-2024 - JUDGMENT.
